watches.label: TINA v1 core — phrase detection and latching
scenarios: features/tina.feature:Exact phrase match triggers a latch
features/tina.feature:A close phrase outside the list does not trigger
features/tina.feature:A generic word does not trigger
features/tina.feature:On match, the session latches and blocks all tool calls
features/tina.feature:While latched, a non-matching text does not unlatch
features/tina.feature:A new user message resets the latch
features/tina.feature:The "/tina reset" command resets the latch
